description: A vulnerable-view unlocked kref release is replaced by a fixed-view mutex-protected kref release in the same candidate-local window.
label_reason: CodeQL facts show vulnerable kref_put and fixed kref_put_mutex in the same candidate-local function/window, matching the patch hunk.

description: Immediate release after RCU-list deletion is replaced by a fixed-view deferred release through call_rcu.
label_reason: CodeQL facts show fixed call_rcu in the candidate window, while the vulnerable source window shows RCU-list deletion with immediate release/free evidence.

description: A fixed-view live-object acquire is introduced in a candidate window where the vulnerable view lacks that live acquire.
label_reason: CodeQL facts show fixed refcount_inc_not_zero in the candidate-local function/window while the vulnerable view lacks the same live acquire.

description: A vulnerable-view unchecked refcount acquire is replaced by a fixed-view live-object acquire in the same candidate-local window.
label_reason: CodeQL facts show vulnerable refcount_inc and fixed refcount_inc_not_zero in the same candidate-local function/window, matching the patch hunk.
